title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 04 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 04 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 04 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 04/01/2023
DCE iron ore futures declined by 0.35% today, the main contract closed 846.5.The traders' willingnessto ship is general.The steel mills are wait and see.The overall trading sentiment of the market is general.PBF at Shandong port deal 838-850 yuan/mt,decrease 1-10 yuan/mt; PBF at Tangshan port dealt 846-852 yuan/mt,decrease 3-14 yuan/mt. Today, it was rumored that the relevant parts of the country were conducting research on iron ore prices. This news touched the market sentiment, and iron ore futures fell back again.
